song.title: Center
song.presentation: C V1 C V1 C V2 C E
song.lyrics:
[c] Chorus . D D/C# G O Christ be the center of our lives . D Be the place we fix our eyes . D/C# G Be the center of our lives [v1] . D 1) And You're the center of the universe . A G Everything was made in You Jesus . D Breath of every living thing . A G Everyone was made for You . G A You hold everything together . G/B A/C# You hold everything together [v2] . D D/C# 2) We lift our eyes to heaven . G And we wrap our lives around Your life . D D/C# G We lift our eyes to heaven to You
[E] Chorus O Christ be the center of our lives Be the place we fix our eyes Be the center of our lives 1) And You're the center of the universe Everything was made in You Jesus Breath of every living thing Everyone was made for You You hold everything together You hold everything together 2) We lift our eyes to heaven And we wrap our lives around Your life We lift our eyes to heaven to You
